title: Cuneiform Tablet #0690: Old Assyrian School Tablet
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. School Tablet document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records school tablet matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
